channel.title: Palmshed
channel.description: Thoughtful engineering, honest evaluation, and enduring craft.

item.title: OpenCode review
item.description: A review of OpenCode based on sustained use through July 2026.

item.title: Antigravity review
item.description: A review of Antigravity based on sustained use through July 2026.

item.title: Codex review
item.description: A review of Codex based on sustained use through July 2026.

item.title: Gemini CLI review
item.description: A review of Gemini CLI based on periodic evaluation through July 2026.

item.title: Claude Code review
item.description: A review of Claude Code based on sustained daily use through 2025.

item.title: Aider review
item.description: A review of Aider based on sustained use from 2024 through 2025.

item.title: Warp review
item.description: A review of Warp, a terminal emulator with integrated AI features, based on sustained use through 2025.

item.title: Cursor review
item.description: A review of Cursor, an AI-first code editor with agent mode, based on sustained use through 2025.

item.title: Continue review
item.description: A review of Continue, an open-source AI code assistant for IDEs, based on evaluation through 2025.

item.title: Goose review
item.description: A review of Goose, an open-source sandboxed AI agent by Block, based on evaluation through early 2026.

item.title: OpenHands review
item.description: A review of OpenHands, an open-source platform for autonomous coding agents, based on evaluation through 2025.

item.title: Cline review
item.description: A review of Cline, an autonomous AI coding assistant for VS Code, based on evaluation through early 2026.

item.title: Roo Code review
item.description: A review of Roo Code, an autonomous AI coding assistant for VS Code, based on evaluation through early 2026.

item.title: Amp review
item.description: A review of Amp, a CLI coding agent for fast interactive code generation, based on early evaluation in 2026.

item.title: Crush review
item.description: A review of Crush, a CLI coding agent focused on simplicity, based on early evaluation in 2026.

item.title: Qwen Code review
item.description: A review of Qwen Code, Alibaba Cloud's CLI coding agent, based on evaluation through 2025 and 2026.
